title: All items from a Board?
excerpt:
Hey, any hints on how to get/query all items from a board? 
I have been able to use items_by_column_values to get items with a specific Column value, but how can I get all items without any filtering?

posts.author: PabloVerano (Pablo Verano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, any hints on how to get/query all items from a board?
I have been able to use items_by_column_values to get items with a specific Column value, but how can I get all items without any filtering?

posts.author: Ayelet (Ayelet Holtzman)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @PabloVerano,
try this query to get all items from a specific board

query {
  boards (ids: 1234567) {
    items {
      id
      name
    }
  }
}

posts.author: PabloVerano (Pablo Verano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @Ayelet!
I really need to improve my GraphQL skills

posts.author: JohnMoore (John Moore)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone have any suggestions on how you would alter that query if you would like to query the board by name instead of id?

posts.author: PabloVerano (Pablo Verano)
posts.cookedHtml: Not possible, as far as I know. I usually run two queries, one searching for the board, then using the id for the second query.
